title: GlobalChatTo
description: A modern globalchat plugin for Velocity servers
body:
# 🌐 GlobalChat for Velocity **GlobalChat** is a Velocity proxy plugin that enables advanced global chat across your Minecraft server network, packed with modern features! --- ## ✨ Features - **/gc Command:** Broadcast messages globally between all servers using `/gc `. - **Per-Server Formatting:** Format messages differently for each server with `format.yml`. - **LuckPerms Prefix Support:** Show LuckPerms prefixes/groups automatically in chat. - **Anti-Spam Delay:** Per-player message cooldown. - **Mute System:** Mute/unmute players from global chat with `/gcmute` and `/gcunmute`. - **Blocked Words:** Prevent unwanted words from being sent. - **Server Whitelist/Blacklist:** Allow or block servers from using global chat. - **Config Reload:** Instantly reload config with `/gcreload`—no restart needed. - **Color Code Support:** Full support for Minecraft color codes (`&`). - **Lightweight & Easy Setup:** No database required, simple configuration. --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Download and place the JAR in your Velocity `plugins/` folder. 2. Start your proxy to generate config files. 3. Edit `config.yml` and `format.yml` as needed. 4. Use `/gcreload` to reload config instantly after editing. --- ## 🔧 Configuration - **`config.yml`**: Customize all plugin messages, permissions, delays, and word/command/server lists. - **`format.yml`**: Set the chat format for each server and the default. - All placeholders and color codes (`&`) supported. - Supports LuckPerms prefix for rich player names. --- ## 🛡️ Permissions - `globalchat.use` — Send messages with `/gc` - `globalchat.mute` — Mute or unmute users from global chat - `globalchat.reload` — Reload plugin configuration --- ## 📝 Commands | Command | Description | |-----------------|-----------------------------------| | `/gc ` | Send a global chat message | | `/gcmute

` | Mute a player from global chat | | `/gcunmute

` | Unmute a player from global chat | | `/gcreload` | Reload the plugin configuration | --- ## 🛠️ Requirements - **Velocity Proxy** (`3.x`) - [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/) (optional, for prefix support) --- ## 📝 Notes - This is a **Velocity-only** plugin (not for Bukkit/Spigot/Paper). - For support, suggestions, or bugs, visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/). --- Enjoy seamless, colorful cross-server chat with GlobalChat!
